itemsPreview.text: Successfully wrote 23737 bytes to .ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/design.md

# design

## 方案摘要

引入独立的 **Project Registry** 作为左侧项目树的唯一顶层数据源，Session 不再参与项目列表聚合。Project 下固定包含一个 `main` space，并可包含多个 Git worktree space；Session 作为 space 下的历史记录，新增会话写入 `projectId + spaceId`，旧会话缺失这两个字段时继续可读可打开。

核心设计：

1. 新增 `~/.pi/agent/pi-web-projects.json` 保存项目/空间元数据；不从历史 session 反推创建项目。
2. 新增轻量 `~/.pi/agent/pi-web-session-index.json` 作为新 session 的 project/space 链接索引；session JSONL header 中同时写入可选 `projectId`、`spaceId` 作为持久真源，索引只是性能缓存。
3. 左侧导航改为 `Project -> Space(main/worktree) -> Sessions(lazy)`：项目和 space 从 registry 读取，只有展开/选中 space 时才读取该 space 的 session。
4. 旧 session 缺少 projectId/spaceId 时不报错；可通过 URL/legacy fallback 打开。可在已注册 space 下以“未归属旧会话”显示 exact-cwd 匹配结果，但不自动回写、不迁移。
5. 兼容现有 WorkTree：继续使用 `pi-web.json.worktree` 的创建模板；注册/刷新项目时通过 `git worktree list --porcelain` 发现已有 worktree，并作为项目子 space 物化/更新。
6. 文件、Git、Trellis、Studio、Terminal 等下游仍消费 cwd/path；Project/Space 是导航与 session 归属层，不替代 workspace cwd。

## 当前代码证据

已阅读并基于以下现状设计：

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` 当前通过 `/api/sessions` -> `getRecentCwds()` -> `buildCwdPickerRows()` 从 session cwd 聚合项目/WorkTree 列表。
- `lib/session-reader.ts` 当前 `listAllSessions()` 扫描 session，并通过 `getGitMetadataForCwd()` 给 session 附带 `worktree/git`。
- `app/api/agent/new/route.ts`、`app/api/agent/draft/route.ts` 和 `lib/agent-session-bootstrap.ts` 当前只接收 `cwd`，创建 session 后未写项目归属。
- `lib/rpc-manager.ts` 的 fork 分支会创建新 JSONL 文件，需要继承/写入 project/space 上下文。
- `lib/git-worktree.ts` 已有 worktree create/status/remove/archive 能力，但缺少“列出某项目全部 worktree space”的 registry 层。
- `lib/allowed-roots.ts` 当前主要从 session cwd 构造允许根；改造后必须纳入 Project Registry paths，否则无 session 的新项目无法打开文件/Studio/Trellis。

## 目标与非目标

### 范围内

- 新增 Project Registry 持久化 schema、读写 lib、API。
- 新增 Project Space schema：`main` 和 `worktree`。
- 新 session / draft session / fork session 关联 `projectId + spaceId`。
- 旧 session 缺字段兼容，不因缺 project/space 报错。
- 左侧导航改为 registry 驱动，space 下按需加载 sessions。
- 兼容现有 WorkTree 创建配置和已有 Git worktree 列表。
- 支持项目/空间 displayName、tags、metadata、pinned、archived、lastOpenedAt。

### 范围外


[596 more lines in file. Use offset=41 to continue.]

{
  "path": ".ypi/tasks/20260707-090031-设计并改造项目注册表与项目空间层级/handoff.md",
  "content": "# handoff

## registry-lib-api implementation

### Files changed

- `lib/project-registry-types.ts` — added Project Registry/project-space schema and API input types.
- `lib/project-registry.ts` — added registry persistence at `getAgentDir()/pi-web-projects.json`, canonical realpath-backed path keys, project registration with main-space creation, duplicate active-project detection, and project/space metadata patch helpers.
- `app/api/projects/route.ts` — added `GET /api/projects` and `POST /api/projects`.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/route.ts` — added project read/update API.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/route.ts` — added project-space listing API.
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/route.ts` — added project-space read/update API.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented Project Registry routes and route ownership.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented Project Registry library modules and canonical path reuse rule.

### Validation

- `npm install --include=dev` — installed missing dev dependencies required by validation; npm reported existing peer/vulnerability warnings.
- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

### Notes / risks

- Scope intentionally limited to Registry lib/API; session linking, WorkTree sync, allowed-roots integration, sidebar UI, and legacy-session UX remain for later subtasks.
- `POST /api/projects` returns an existing active project when canonical `pathKey` already exists; archived projects with the same path do not block a new active record.
"
}

## sidebar-project-tree implementation

### Files changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — switched the sidebar project selector to `/api/projects`, renders Project → Space entries from the registry, registers added paths through `POST /api/projects`, lazy-loads linked sessions through the project-space sessions API, shows exact-cwd legacy sessions in a separate “未关联旧会话” section, and forwards selected project/space context for new chats.
- `components/AppShell.tsx` — tracks active and new-session project/space context from the sidebar and passes it into chat creation while preserving legacy URL session restore behavior.
- `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — accepts optional new-session project/space context and forwards it to the agent hook.
- `hooks/useAgentSession.ts` — includes optional `projectId`/`spaceId` in new and draft session requests and local session-created projections.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented the Project Registry-driven sidebar and project/space context plumbing.

### Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

### Notes / risks

- No manual browser verification was run in this delegated pass.
- WorkTree creation refreshes registry data and relies on the registry space match by path after refresh; checker should verify the newly created worktree is selected/linked in the browser flow.

## metadata-legacy-ux implementation

### Files changed

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` — added a workspace metadata action menu and modal for editing project/space display name, tags, pinned, and archived state via the existing Project Registry PATCH APIs; pinned/archived updates immediately affect active sidebar sorting/visibility; missing spaces keep metadata editable while new-session creation remains disabled; legacy rows now show an inline “未关联” marker.
- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented Project Registry metadata editing in the sidebar module map.

### Validation

- `npm run lint` — passed.
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed.

### Notes / risks

- Archived projects/spaces are hidden from the active selector; this subtask did not add a separate archived-project management view.

## Check Complete

### Findings Fixed

- 修复了 WorkTree 创建后立即新建聊天未携带 `spaceId` 的问题：现在优先使用 `POST /api/git/worktrees` 返回的 `registryLink` 选中新 worktree space，并把 `projectId + spaceId` 传给新会话，避免新 worktree 首聊落成未关联旧会话。
- 修复了新建/draft 会话仅校验 `projectId/spaceId` 存在、未校验 `cwd` 与所选 space 是否一致的问题：现在按 canonical `pathKey` 比较，不允许把任意 cwd 伪装关联到别的项目空间。

subtasks.title: 新增 Project Registry 类型、lib 与基础 API
acceptance: registry 文件不存在时 GET /api/projects 返回空列表而非报错
POST /api/projects 可注册普通项目 path，并创建 main space
PATCH 可更新 displayName/tags/pinned/archived/metadata/lastOpenedAt

subtasks.title: 新增 session project/space 链接与旧 session 兼容
acceptance: 新建 session 的 header 含 projectId/spaceId
旧 session 缺 projectId/spaceId 时 GET /api/sessions/:id 成功
fork linked session 后新 session 继承 project/space
space sessions API 不通过 sessions 聚合创建项目

subtasks.title: 兼容现有 WorkTree 配置并同步为 space
acceptance: 注册 main project 后可发现已有 git worktree space
从 UI/API 创建 WorkTree 后 registry 出现 worktree space
无 session 的已注册 project 也可通过文件 API 访问
删除 WorkTree 后 active sidebar 不再显示该 space

subtasks.title: 改造 AppShell/SessionSidebar 为 Project/Space 导航
acceptance: 空 registry 显示添加项目引导，不扫描 sessions 生成项目
选择 project main/worktree space 后才加载 sessions
新聊天从 selected space 创建并正确显示在该 space 下
旧 session URL 可打开且不因缺 project/space 崩溃

subtasks.title: 补齐项目/空间元数据编辑与 legacy 展示
acceptance: 项目和 space 可改昵称/标签并持久化
pinned/archived 影响排序和可见性
legacy sessions 有明确未关联标记
missing space 不允许新建 session 但不丢 metadata

subtasks.title: 更新文档并完成验证
acceptance: 文档说明 session 不再是项目列表数据源
自动验证通过
手工验收清单完成并记录结果
